message:
fix(runtime): Reduce operator callable monomorphization (Phase 13)

Create operator_ops.zig with concrete type functions (i64, f64) for
modulo, power, true division, and floor division. Update operator
structs (OperatorMod, OperatorPow, OperatorTruediv, OperatorFloordiv,
pow) to dispatch to concrete functions instead of inline type checks.

This reduces monomorphization from O(n × types) to O(n) by:
- modI64/modF64: Concrete modulo implementations
- powI64/powF64: Concrete power with zero-division check
- truedivI64/truedivF64: Concrete true division
- floordivI64/floordivF64: Concrete floor division

Expected impact: ~1500 monomorphizations → ~15 for operators.
